benchmark.measured_on: AMD RX 9060 XT, AMD Ryzen 5 5600 6-core, Vulkan + RADV_PERFTEST=rm_kq=1, llama.cpp b9381, MTP n_max=2, q4 KV, -ub 2048, -ot blk.18-39, ctx 81920, whisper on CPU
benchmark.notes: Fast alternative (+32% over base) at the >=80K context the OpenClaw harness requires. MTP speculative decoding (b9381). Sustained 38.3 t/s, eviction-proof: verified across a 61K-token deep-prompt stress with VRAM flat at ~15038/16304 MiB (headroom ~1266 MiB). REQUIRES q4 KV at 80K — q8 KV is too tight (hr <=103 MiB, evicts) and -ub 4096 + MTP OOMs. Win/neutral by workload (big on structured/code/tool, ~neutral on prose 28.5). Trade vs the base default: q4 KV (lower attention precision than q8) for the speed. Needs whisper off the GPU (--no-gpu). Switch in via /api/ai/model/switch. See docs/BENCHMARKS.md (2026-06-17).

benchmark.measured_on: AMD RX 9060 XT, AMD Ryzen 5 5600 6-core, Vulkan + RADV_PERFTEST=rm_kq=1, llama.cpp b8996
AMD RX 9060 XT, AMD Ryzen 5 5600 6-core, Vulkan, llama.cpp b8951
AMD RX 9060 XT, AMD Ryzen 5 5600 6-core, Vulkan + RADV_PERFTEST=rm_kq=1, llama.cpp b9381, q8 KV, -ub 4096, -ot blk.20-39, ctx 81920, whisper on CPU
benchmark.notes: DEFAULT (2026-06-17). Base Q5_K_XL at the >=80K context the OpenClaw harness requires, best KV numerics (q8). Sustained 29.1 t/s, eviction-proof: verified across a 61K-token deep-prompt stress with VRAM stable at ~16257/16304 MiB (idle headroom ~900 MiB). Needs whisper off the GPU (--no-gpu) for the headroom — 96K+ evicts, 80K is the safe ceiling. For +32% at the same context (q4 KV trade) switch to Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP-UD-Q5_K_XL. See docs/BENCHMARKS.md (2026-06-17).

benchmark.measured_on: AMD RX 9060 XT, AMD Ryzen 5 5600 6-core, DDR4, Vulkan + RADV_PERFTEST=rm_kq=1, llama.cpp b9186/b9381, ngl=99, MTP n_max=2, ctx 32768
benchmark.notes: Hybrid DeltaNet SSM+attn (16/64 standard attn layers, 48 DeltaNet). RS must stay GPU-local — nkvo breaks DeltaNet fused kernel (garbage output). ngl<99 drops to ~2 t/s; partial offload defeats DeltaNet GPU fusion. ctv/ctk with fa is mandatory on AMD Vulkan. MTP CLIFF: the draft-mtp speculative path accelerates ONLY at ctx <= ~34816 (cliff between 34816 and 36864); above it TG snaps back to the ~17.5 baseline. ctx was 49152 (over the cliff, MTP gave ~+2%); lowered to 32768 to capture the full MTP gain: ~17.1 -> ~30 t/s (+75%) with n_max=2, q4_0 KV. Crossing any of {ctx>~35K, n_max>=3, q8 KV} silently disables speculation. NOT fixed by b9381 (DeltaNet-specific; the MoE 35B cliff WAS fixed by b9381). See docs/BENCHMARKS.md '27B cliff localization'.
